hooks.description: Emit paths and versions of common dev tools so the agent does not burn round-trips discovering them
Soft nudge the agent to call memory_store (or consultant remember) when a long stretch of work has happened without one — see docs/plans/MEMORY_REMINDER_HOOK.md
Block git commit — agents stage only, humans commit
Block 'git worktree add' — all changes must stay in the single working tree the developer can see (read-only 'git worktree list' allowed)
Block 'git worktree add' — all changes must stay in the single working tree the developer can see (read-only 'git worktree list' allowed)
Warn when an artifact-producing mvn command (compile/install/etc.) is run, since it will not rebuild dependent modules; report ~/.m2 artifact staleness
Block direct mvn test — must use mcp__ar-test-runner__start_test_run
Block bash manipulation of checkstyle configuration (checkstyle.xml, checkstyle-suppressions.xml, any /checkstyle/ dir, etc.) — abandon the task rather than tamper with enforcement
Block simple `ls <path>` / `grep <pattern> <file>` — use the structured `glob` / `grep` tools instead (compound shell features are allowed through)
Block shell writes into ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/ — use ar-consultant/ar-manager
Warn on `git log` — workstream narrative lives in memory_branch_context, not commit titles
Inject .github/CLAUDE.md context when reading analysis.yaml
Inject bidirectional dependency check when reading any pom.xml
Block edits to checkstyle configuration — abandon the task rather than tamper with enforcement
Block dependency/module/parent structural changes in pom.xml — dependency graph is externally controlled (non-structural edits pass through)
Warn if ar-consultant not called before editing computation-layer Java
Inject .github/CLAUDE.md context when editing analysis.yaml
Validate analysis.needs includes all coverage-* uploaders before edit
Warn on added defensive-tolerance patterns (see .claude/hooks/rules/fail-loud.md)
Block edits to ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/ — use ar-consultant/ar-manager
Remind of the full add-a-capability chain (MCP tool -> API -> factory -> job -> codec -> request -> runner -> tests) when editing any file implicated in it
Block MultiEdit of checkstyle configuration — abandon the task rather than tamper with enforcement
Block MultiEdit in ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/ — use ar-consultant/ar-manager
Remind of the full add-a-capability chain (MCP tool -> API -> factory -> job -> codec -> request -> runner -> tests) when editing any file implicated in it
Block NotebookEdit of checkstyle configuration — abandon the task rather than tamper with enforcement
Block NotebookEdit in ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/ — use ar-consultant/ar-manager
Block writes of checkstyle configuration — abandon the task rather than tamper with enforcement
Block dependency/module/parent structural changes in pom.xml — dependency graph is externally controlled (non-structural edits pass through)
Warn if ar-consultant not called before writing computation-layer Java
Inject .github/CLAUDE.md context when writing analysis.yaml
Validate analysis.needs includes all coverage-* uploaders before write
Warn on added defensive-tolerance patterns (see .claude/hooks/rules/fail-loud.md)
Block writes to ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/ — use ar-consultant/ar-manager
Remind of the full add-a-capability chain (MCP tool -> API -> factory -> job -> codec -> request -> runner -> tests) when editing any file implicated in it
Warn when a just-read source file (java/py/ts/etc.) is within 100 lines of the 1500 soft limit — refactor signal, not a compaction target
Scan written Java for Producer pattern violations (.evaluate/.toDouble/.toFloat in computation code, for+setMem loops, System.out/err, multiple new Model())
Warn on @Test methods with no assertion (see .claude/hooks/rules/fail-loud.md)
Warn on line-number references in source comments (e.g. Foo.java:123, 'line 660-664') — they go stale on the next edit
Scan edited Java for Producer pattern violations (.evaluate/.toDouble/.toFloat in computation code, for+setMem loops, System.out/err, multiple new Model())
Warn on @Test methods with no assertion (see .claude/hooks/rules/fail-loud.md)
Warn on line-number references in source comments (e.g. Foo.java:123, 'line 660-664') — they go stale on the next edit
Warn on line-number references in source comments (e.g. Foo.java:123, 'line 660-664') — they go stale on the next edit
Record timestamp of consultant call for enforce-consultant-first.sh
